query: Write a handbook for our Kubernetes operator — it has multiple entrypoints (CLI, webhooks, controllers) and a complex reconciliation loop. The on-call team needs to know how to bring it up, what can go wrong, and how to recover.
Can you audit our HANDBOOK.md? We've had three releases since it was last updated and I'm worried it's drifted from the actual behavior.
The default retry policy changed from 3 to 5 in the latest release. Update the handbook to reflect this everywhere it mentions the retry count.
document how my event router service works internally — particularly the state machine and failure recovery paths. the on-call team needs this before the next oncall rotation.

my redis session manager has been running in prod for 6 months but nobody documented how to actually operate it. can you write something up? it has a config file with about 8 options and two failure modes i know of
write runbooks for my job scheduler — it has a leader election mechanism that trips people up when the primary fails over and nobody knows how to recover
document the bring-up procedure for our ML inference service — it needs the model weights downloaded first, then a specific startup order, and has 4 env vars that have to be set correctly

our authentication service has been running for 2 years but we have no operational docs. I want something covering startup, config options, what to do when JWTs fail to validate, and how to rotate the signing keys
our cross-model plugin has hooks and slash commands and nobody on the team knows how it runs day-to-day. can you write something comprehensive about how to operate it
write a technical reference for our data pipeline — I want sections on how each stage works, what happens when upstream data is late, and the verification steps before promoting to production
Write a README for my new npm library called 'react-query-utils' so people know what it does, how to install it, and see a basic usage example
add the v2.3.0 release to our CHANGELOG.md — we shipped new rate limiting and fixed a memory leak in the worker pool
Generate JSDoc comments for all the exported functions in src/api.ts and produce an API reference document I can publish to our docs site
write a post-mortem for last tuesday's outage — root cause was a deadlock in the connection pool when we hit 10k concurrent users
i need a quickstart guide for my SDK — just cover install, authenticate, and how to send your first message in under 5 minutes. keep it simple for new users
document our postgres schema — I need a reference showing each table, its columns with types, indexes, and the foreign key relationships between them
can you explain how this HANDBOOK.md is structured and what each section covers? I want to understand the format before I write my own
write an ADR for why we chose kafka over rabbitmq for our event bus — i need to document the trade-offs we considered
add inline comments to this authentication middleware — explain what the JWT verification block does and why we check the expiry before the signature
the team asked me to 'document the deploy process' — i just need a few bullet points in the README under a Deployment section covering our 3-step heroku deploy
